title: Inspection services
doc_html:
§823.  Inspection services

Any financially interested person, may, upon request secure federal inspection services at nominal charges or fees as outlined and in accordance with USDA Bulletin SRA-AMS No. 137 (Revised).
doc_text:
§823.  Inspection services
Any financially interested person, may, upon request secure federal inspection services at nominal charges or fees as outlined and in accordance with USDA Bulletin SRA-AMS No. 137 (Revised).
